Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import csv
from pathlib import Path

csv_path = Path\('data/claims.csv'\)
with open\(csv_path\) as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader\(f\)
    rows = list\(reader\)

print\(f'Total rows   : {len\(rows\)}'\)
print\(f'Total columns: {len\(reader.fieldnames\)}'\)
print\(\)
print\('Columns:'\)
for i, col in enumerate\(reader.fieldnames, 1\):
    print\(f'  {i:2}. {col}'\)
print\(\)
print\('Claim IDs in CSV:'\)
for r in rows:
    print\(f'  {r[\\"rec_id\\"]:6} | {r[\\"patient_name\\"]:20} | {r[\\"payer\\"]:30} | {r[\\"denial_code\\"]:8} | {r[\\"priority_label\\"]:6} | days_to_deadline: {r[\\"days_to_deadline\\"]}'\)
")
